research_question: Round11b batch04: continue serial-only execution for the full158 remaining queue with the next 12 Alpha158-style atomic candidates.

source_policy.notes: Batch04 follows the same whitelist-only governance.

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: average absolute overnight gap magnitude over 20 days
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native gap_ret abs rolling mean

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: absolute gap magnitude differs from sign-consistency style overnight measures.

source_provenance.source_title: Alpha158 style intraday absolute return noise
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: average absolute intraday return magnitude over 20 days
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native intraday_ret abs rolling mean

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: absolute intraday-return noise differs from path-efficiency and range-share constructions.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: 20-day correlation between returns and turnover rate
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native pct_ret and turnover_rate rolling correlation

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: turnover-based linkage differs from amount-based correlation form.

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger coupling between absolute return and log amount

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: 20-day correlation between absolute returns and log amount
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native abs(pct_ret) and log_amount rolling correlation

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: volatility-volume coupling channel differs from standalone volatility level.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: rolling standard deviation of turnover rate
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native turnover_rate rolling std

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: turnover dispersion level differs from concentration structure.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: difference between up-day and down-day turnover means
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native turnover_rate conditioned on return sign

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: mean-spread breadth channel differs from signed-share imbalance ratio.

source_provenance.source_title: Alpha158 style positive gap continuation frequency
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: frequency of up-gap and up-intraday co-occurrence
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native gap_ret and intraday_ret sign events

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: event-frequency continuation differs from broad sign-consistency share.

source_provenance.source_title: Alpha158 style negative gap continuation frequency
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: frequency of down-gap and down-intraday co-occurrence
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native gap_ret and intraday_ret sign events

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: pure downside continuation frequency differs from net followthrough magnitude.

signal_pool.interpretation: stronger coupling between range ratio and turnover

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: 20-day correlation between normalized range and turnover rate
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native range_ratio_daily and turnover_rate correlation

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: cross-variable stress coupling differs from pure range expansion persistence.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: negative standard deviation of close-location in bar range

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: pure close-location stability statistic differs from prior mixed close-position form.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: average absolute difference between upper and lower shadow shares
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native OHLC shadow decomposition

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: absolute asymmetry amplitude differs from signed asymmetry direction.

source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: 20-day correlation between returns and log turnover
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented from project-native pct_ret and log_turnover rolling correlation

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: correlation to log turnover differs from slope-based beta versus dlog amount.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later composability-screening round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that remains weaker at the head slice should be rejected rather than rescued by family tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, stability-cap, overlay, or family-composition changes inside this round.
notes: This batch continues the full158 remaining queue under whitelist-only governance.
